name: Surnadal Sparebank
summary: Surnadal Sparebank, an independent savings bank, provides various banking product and services to individuals and businesses in Norway. The company offers savings and pension accounts. It also provides mortgage, car, other vehicles, motor homes/caravans, motorcycles/quads, snowmobiles, construction, and home loans, as well as small loans and refinancing, and bridge financing; bank guarantees; and overdraft services. In addition, the company offers various insurance products, such as home and leisure insurance; liability, customer's, cyber, farm building agriculture, operating tools and crop, property, health, landlord, craft, commercial, personal, travel, large car, goods during transport, and occupational injuries insurance, as well as home insurance agriculture products; vehicle insurance comprising ATV/Quad biking, motorhome, boat, caravan, motorcycle, moped and scooter, private tractor, veteran vehicle, and snowmobile; and other insurance, including horse, and dog and breed cat. Further, it provides mobile, online, and Internet banking services; credit cards; bank cards; overseas payment services; fund savings; mobile payments; and vehicles, machinery, operating equipment, and movable properties leasing services. Additionally, the company offers iZettle, a mobile payment terminal. Surnadal Sparebank was founded in 1842 and is based in Surnadal, Norway. As of April 30, 2021, Surnadal Sparebank operates as a subsidiary of Sparebank 1 Nordvest.
